arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EBS snapshot.

data_encryption_key_id.description: The identifier of the data encryption key used to encrypt the snapshot.

description.description: The description of the EBS snapshot.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the EBS snapshot is encrypted.

id.description: The ID of the EBS snapshot.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key ID used to encrypt the snapshot.

outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the Outpost where the snapshot resides, if applicable.

owner_alias.description: The AWS account alias of the snapshot's owner.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the snapshot's owner.

snapshot_id.description: The unique identifier of the EBS snapshot.

start_time.description: The time when the snapshot was initiated.

state.description: The current state of the EBS snapshot (e.g., pending, completed, error).

storage_tier.description: The storage tier of the EBS snapshot.

tags.description: The tags associated with the EBS snapshot.

volume_id.description: The ID of the EBS volume from which the snapshot was created.

volume_size.description: The size of the volume, in GiB, from which the snapshot was created.
